style_notes: All expressions must maintain chibi 1:1.5 head-body ratio. Face occupies approximately 60% of portrait canvas. Eyes must be expressive and readable at small UI size. Watercolor soft lines, warm pastel. No text baked in. Transparent background.

expressions.dialogue_state: listening or idle
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 山田律 (Yamada Ritsu), 29-year-old male. Default/neutral expression: slightly tired eyes, soft closed mouth, not smiling but not unhappy — the face of someone who has been working too hard for too long but is beginning to breathe. Chibi proportions, warm pastel. 256x256px, transparent background.
expressions.design_note: Ritsu's default is subdued; his healing arc starts here. Eyes slightly heavy-lidded, posture-neutral in face.

expressions.dialogue_state: positive puzzle outcome or NPC warmth moment
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 山田律 happy expression: wide open eyes, genuine slightly-surprised smile — the look of someone who didn't expect to feel good but does. Not over-the-top, warm and a little disarmed. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: His happy is rare and honest; not performance, more like a crack in the armor.

expressions.dialogue_state: puzzle reasoning or NPC insight moment
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 山田律 thinking expression: eyes slightly narrowed, head tilted subtly, mouth closed. The focused look of someone beginning to care about something. Not stressed, quietly engaged. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: Shows his Tokyo-analyst mind applied to something worth caring about; a positive evolution of default.

expressions.dialogue_state: unexpected NPC reveal or plot beat
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 山田律 surprised expression: eyes wide open, eyebrows raised, mouth slightly open — the look of someone who expected nothing and got something real. Clean startle, not comedic. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: Readable at small dialogue portrait size; eyes are primary signal.

expressions.dialogue_state: ritsu-only: first beauty/smell moment (Ch3花田)
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 山田律 react_jump expression: eyes suddenly open and soft, mouth slightly open in genuine wonder — the face of someone who has not felt something beautiful in five years and just did. Warm, unguarded, slightly watery eyes. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: This expression is ritsu-specific and rare; the emotional high point of his arc.

expressions.dialogue_state: recording in notebook, observing
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 丸山ひなた (Maruyama Hinata), 24-year-old female. Default expression: calm, slightly downcast eyes focused on something out of frame (her notebook), closed small mouth. The composed face of someone who has a system for everything. Signature sakura pink #F0C4C4 in clothing. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: Her default shows controlled attention; she is measuring something.

expressions.dialogue_state: data aligns perfectly or ritsu moment
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 丸山ひなた happy expression: very small genuine smile, eyes crinkle slightly — a warmth that escapes her control system. Not exuberant. The face of someone who allowed one thing to be nice. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: Her happy is quiet; half-smile max; eyes tell the real story.

expressions.dialogue_state: adding a note to notebook, calculating
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 丸山ひなた thinking expression: eyes looking up-right (accessing data), mouth neutral, pen-tapping gesture implied. Focused precision. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: Shows her notebook system at work; analytical but warm-toned.

expressions.dialogue_state: ritsu does something outside her predictions
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 丸山ひなた surprised expression: eyes wide, slight furrow — not fear, but system-error confusion. The face of someone whose model just got a 37% deviation. Cute and genuine. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: Her surprised face is about data error not danger; curious, not scared.

expressions.dialogue_state: Ch5 「还行」 moment; seeing 灯台 light for first time
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 丸山ひなた react_jump expression: eyes suddenly soft and open, a warmth she can't log in her notebook. The control system down for one breath. Not sad, not ecstatic — just present, unguarded. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: The rarest ひなた expression; almost identical emotional beat to ritsu's react_jump but from her internal world.

expressions.dialogue_state: at dock, listening
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 磯部健三 (Isobe Kenzo), approx 70-year-old male fisherman. Default expression: weathered calm face, eyes steady and unhurried. The face of a man who has seen fifty years of sea. Signature deep blue #4A6D9A in clothing. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: Wrinkles from weather not stress; eyes hold depth not sadness.

expressions.dialogue_state: ritsu shows growth
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 磯部健三 happy: very slight upward curve of mouth — for him this IS a grin. Eyes warm but still calm. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: His happy is microscopic; players who know him will recognize it.

expressions.dialogue_state: checking weather or tide
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 磯部健三 thinking: eyes slightly squinted against imaginary horizon-glare, mouth neutral. The focused look of a mariner reading conditions. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: Thinking for kenzo means looking at something far away.

expressions.dialogue_state: unexpected catch or news
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 磯部健三 surprised: eyebrows raised slightly, eyes marginally wider — still calm but genuine response. The sea-captain version of surprised. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: Even his surprised is contained; decades of ocean taught him not to overreact.

expressions.dialogue_state: Ch1 kenzo says 「能走就行」to ritsu's growth
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 磯部健三 react_jump: eyes soft and far-away, slight nod energy — the face of a man who recognizes something that took him forty years to learn, manifesting in someone else. Tender. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: Not joy, more like recognition. The rarest kenzo expression.

expressions.dialogue_state: observing, forming assessment
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 桐島梅子 (Kirishima Umeko), approx 55-year-old female pottery artisan. Default expression: calm direct gaze, slight upward expression of assessment — she is always reading people like clay. Signature bamboo green #7DBE77. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: Direct but warm; not stern; she is interested not judging.

expressions.dialogue_state: ritsu's bowl moment; craft moment
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 桐島梅子 happy: a full warm smile — for Umeko happy comes easy, grounded in three decades of making things with her hands. Crinkle eyes. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: Her warmth is accessible and honest; she doesn't hide her satisfaction.

expressions.dialogue_state: preparing to ask ritsu the hard question
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 桐島梅子 thinking: eyes quiet, head slightly tilted, mouth closed but mobile — forming the exact right words. Artisan precision with language. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: Her thinking face is the same as shaping clay; methodical, present.

expressions.dialogue_state: ritsu says something genuine she didn't expect
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 桐島梅子 surprised: eyes open wide, honest delight — someone who has been asking the same question for thirty years and just got a new answer. Warm surprise. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: Her surprised is joyful not alarmed.

expressions.dialogue_state: the moment ritsu's irregular bowl is placed on display
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 桐島梅子 react_jump: eyes soft and full, a smile that has thirty years of bowls behind it. The face of an artisan recognizing when something imperfect is exactly right. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: This is her most emotionally open moment; imperfection validated.

expressions.dialogue_state: observing nature or ritsu's movements
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 海野夏帆 (Umino Naho), 32-year-old female nature guide. Default expression: calm listening face, eyes slightly angled as if hearing something far away, mouth neutral. Signature deep forest green #3D6645. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: She notices everything before she says anything; default is active listening.

expressions.dialogue_state: handing ritsu the half-open flower bundle
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 海野夏帆 happy: a gentle open smile — shy but genuine. The face of someone who finds it easier to express through giving flowers than words, but this once is smiling. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: Naho's happy is quiet and flower-like; soft, not loud.

expressions.dialogue_state: assessing plant health or path condition
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 海野夏帆 thinking: head tilted, eyes focused downward-left, tracking something invisible. The attentiveness of a field naturalist. Quiet, sure. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: Her thinking face looks like she's hearing the mountain.

expressions.dialogue_state: forcing herself to speak directly for first time
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 海野夏帆 surprised: eyes open, breath caught — the face of someone who just said something too direct for her comfort and isn't sure how it landed. Vulnerable. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: Her surprised is a form of self-exposure; she surprised herself too.

expressions.dialogue_state: Ch3 delivering her key line about half-open flowers
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 海野夏帆 react_jump: soft open eyes, the gentlest smile, like sunlight through leaves — she is teaching ritsu by example right now, and she knows it. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: This is her most articulate moment through expression, not words.

expressions.dialogue_state: standing at lighthouse, keeping watch
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 丸山冬子 (Maruyama Fuyuko), 65-year-old female lighthouse keeper's widow. Default expression: calm, warm-eyed serenity. The face of someone who has made peace with waiting and finds it dignified, not sad. Signature deep night blue #2A4060. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: She radiates quiet protection; default is not neutral, it is peaceful.

expressions.dialogue_state: returning a kept item to its rightful owner
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 丸山冬子 happy: warm grandmother smile, eyes soft and full — the happiness of someone whose purpose was fulfilled. Not triumph, not relief — rightness. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: Her happy is about completion, not excitement.

expressions.dialogue_state: deciding when to give ritsu what渉 left behind
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 丸山冬子 thinking: eyes looking to the side, slight nostalgic weight — she is measuring the right moment like a lighthouse keeper reads weather. Quiet and deliberate. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: Her thinking is heavy with six decades of knowing how things should be timed.

expressions.dialogue_state: recognizing渉's prediction came true
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 丸山冬子 surprised: eyes widened gently, hand-to-heart gesture implied — the surprise of the unmistakable. Not shock, recognition. Like the lighthouse finding what it was looking for. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: Her surprised is always recognition; she's been expecting this.

expressions.dialogue_state: Ch6 lighthouse ignites; 「渉さん、見えてますよ」
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 丸山冬子 react_jump: eyes full and shining, the most open her face has ever been — not crying, not laughing, just the face of a woman whose longest vigil just completed. Profound warmth. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: This is the emotional peak of the whole game expressed in one face.

expressions.dialogue_state: sitting wherever feels right
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 议长·橘猫 (Chairman, orange tabby cat). Default expression: cat resting face — slightly narrowed dignified eyes, the air of someone who has been running this island far longer than anyone else. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: Cat's resting expression is inherently judgmental but the watercolor warmth softens it.

expressions.dialogue_state: approving of ritsu; that 12-second sit-beside moment
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 议长·橘猫 happy: cat happy squint — eyes crinkled to happy slits. The face of a cat who has approved something and everyone knows it. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: Cat's approval is enormous; this is the Chairman endorsing ritsu's island membership.

expressions.dialogue_state: sitting near ritsu making his judgment
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 议长·橘猫 thinking: cat considering face — one eye slightly more open, tail still, the deliberate assessment of a very old cat deciding something important. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: This is the face during the famous 12 seconds.

expressions.dialogue_state: something genuinely new on the island
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 议长·橘猫 surprised: ears fully forward, eyes wide — for a cat this old to be surprised, something truly unusual must have happened. Alert and genuinely interested. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: Very rare expression; the Chairman has seen everything before — almost.

expressions.dialogue_state: attending Fuyuko's nightly lighthouse vigil
expressions.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait. 议长·橘猫 react_jump: eyes softly closed, content expression of deep satisfaction — the face of a cat being exactly where it is supposed to be. Warmth absolute. 256x256px transparent.
expressions.design_note: His highest expression state; he closes his eyes meaning full trust and contentment.
